table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 在未执行锁闭和挂标签条件下工作

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 操作员在未关闭电源的情况下进入刀库

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

para.text: 操作员在禁用安全装置及功能的情况下进入刀库

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 错误安装刀片之后执行T-指令或换刀指令

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

para.text: 在操作刀库时时，操作员将手伸入刀库

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

para.text: 操作员于油污地面工作

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 不自然后退，手被塞入刀具和物体之间

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 操作员在升高位置处工作

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 当操作门打开或关闭时手或其他身体部位被卡在刀库门内

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 任由安全护板或维护改版开启或移除

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 在刀库内存有刀具的情况下执行清理或维护

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 手部或身体被割伤或穿刺

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: 在未佩戴保护手套的条件下执行清理作业

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:3px; margin-left:3px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
